initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> This is the final round. The offer is 2X for 1Y. I have 5X and 25Y. Losing 1Y isn't a huge deal, but gaining 2X is good. I'm willing to accept this as it improves my resource diversity. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> This looks good to me! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order. The content within the tags appears valid.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting the trade is good, as it increases resource diversity. While I don't know the opponent's valuation, getting X is generally positive. There's no obvious way to improve the payoff further within the constraints of accepting/rejecting.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Since it's the final round and the opponent stated it was their final offer, accepting is the most sensible move. Rejecting at this point would likely result in no trade.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason clearly explains why accepting the trade aligns with my goals. The message is consistent with the acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I haven't made any proposals, so I'm well within my proposal limit.
</critique>
